features.title: Provider adapter contracts and registry
acceptance: Registry can validate by provider type
OpenAI-compatible and Ollama adapters are present

features.title: Provider connection store and web form view-model
Provider verification tests
evidence: npm run check -> tests 6, pass 6, fail 0

features.title: Streaming parsers for OpenAI-compatible and Ollama
evidence: tests/chat-core.test.ts covers OpenAI SSE parser and Ollama chat streaming

features.title: Provider chat streaming methods
acceptance: OpenAI-compatible adapter posts to /chat/completions with stream=true
Ollama adapter posts to /api/chat with stream=true
AbortSignal is passed to provider fetch

features.title: Unified chat engine send/retry/edit foundation
acceptance: Sending adds user and assistant messages immutably
Usage is attached to assistant message
Editing a user message truncates following messages
evidence: tests/chat-core.test.ts -> chat engine sends a user message, collects assistant text, and supports retry/edit

features.title: Local save for chat history
acceptance: Chat sessions can be persisted through a storage adapter after send/retry/edit
evidence: Deferred to P0-M4 storage adapter implementation
